title: Language Task

WELCOME_PAGE.welcome:
Welcome to our study!

Thanks for taking part.

timeout-warning: The experiment will end in one minute due to inactivity for four minutes.
timeout-exceeded: The experiment will now end due to inactivity for five minutes.

TECHNICAL_SETTINGS.begin-technical:
Technical settings

In the next step, we ask you to select and test your microphone and adjust the volume.

Please perform the experiment using headphones.
TECHNICAL_SETTINGS.end-technical:
Thank you!

You have successfully completed the technical settings. Click "Continue" to begin the experiment.
TECHNICAL_SETTINGS.mic-select-text:
Please select your microphone.

You will test it shortly and can return to this page if it does not work.
TECHNICAL_SETTINGS.mic-test:
Please say a word out loud to test your microphone.

Speak loudly and clearly.
TECHNICAL_SETTINGS.recording-check:
Did you hear the word you recorded?

If you want to repeat the recording, press "Change microphone".

If you want to listen again, press "Play recording".

If you are satisfied with the recording, press "Continue".
TECHNICAL_SETTINGS.speaker-check:
When you click "Continue", a sentence will be played.

Please adjust the volume of your headphones so that you can clearly understand the sentence.
TECHNICAL_SETTINGS.speaker-check-restart: Is the volume loud enough but still comfortable?
TECHNICAL_SETTINGS.speaker-intensity: Please indicate how loud your headphones are set.
TECHNICAL_SETTINGS.fullscreen-message: The online study will switch to fullscreen mode once you press the button below.

PLANG.begin-training-session:
Training

You will now be guided through the language task using some example sentences.

Please read the instructions carefully and answer accordingly.
PLANG.explanation-pre-playback: You will hear a woman’s voice saying a sentence. The last word will be unclear.
PLANG.explanation-post-playback:
As you have probably noticed, the last word was indeed unclear.

Please listen to the sentence again. Then indicate how you would rate the clarity of the word from very unclear (0%) to very clear (100%).
PLANG.end-of-first-tutorial-sentence: You have now answered all questions about this sentence. Click "Continue" to start the next sentence.
PLANG.end-of-tutorial:
Thank you!

You have successfully completed the training. Click "continue" to start the full experiment.
PLANG.ready-for-next-stimulus: Are you ready for the next sentence?
PLANG.pause-stimulus: Time for a short break. When you are ready for the next $1 sentences, click "Continue".
PLANG.word-response-stimulus: Which word did you understand at the end of the sentence?
PLANG.word-question:
Which word did you hear?

Click “Continue” and then say the word you heard loudly and clearly.

If you are not entirely sure, say the word you think you heard — but please avoid random guessing.

If you did not understand anything, please say the word “nothing” loudly and clearly.
PLANG.word-question-short: Now say loudly and clearly the word you think you heard. Say the word "nothing" if you did not understand anything. Click "Continue" after the recording.
PLANG.explanation-post-recording:
Now, please indicate how confident you are in your answer from very unsure (0%) to very sure (100%).

In case you understood nothing, please also indicate how confident you are in having heard nothing from very unsure (0%) to very sure (100%).
PLANG.clarity-question: How clearly did you hear the word?
PLANG.confidence-question: How confident are you in your answer?
PLANG.word-question-prior-question: Was the word you said also the word you expected at the end of the sentence?
PLANG.word-question-prior:
Which word did you expect at the end of the sentence?

Click "Continue" and then say loudly and clearly the word you expected.
PLANG.expectation-question: How strongly did you expect this word?
